requirements: Implement complete user registration and profile functionality

Error messages display clearly for user registration and profile failures
user registration and profile data persists correctly across sessions

FR-01.title: Build User Registration and Profile API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for user registration and profile feature in Music Streaming Service. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.description: Create user interface components for user registration and profile. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.
